entities.name: PIGEONPEA
entities.description: A legume crop characterized by insect-aided natural out-crossing and used in the study for genetic mapping.

entities.name: INSECT-AIDED NATURAL OUT-CROSSING
entities.description: A process in pigeonpea that impedes the genetic purity of seeds.

entities.name: GENETIC PURITY
entities.description: The consistency of genetic makeup in seeds, which is impeded by out-crossing.

entities.name: PRE-ANTHESIS CLEISTOGAMY
entities.description: A condition where flowers remain closed before anthesis, promoting self-pollination.

entities.name: SELF-POLLINATION
entities.description: The process of fertilization within the same flower, helping maintain genetic purity.

entities.name: CLEISTOGAMOUS FLOWERS
entities.description: Flowers that do not open, which are linked with shriveled seeds.

entities.name: SHRIVELED SEEDS
entities.description: An undesirable seed quality trait linked with cleistogamous flowers.

entities.name: GENOMICS TOOLS
entities.description: Tools used in breeding to overcome constraints such as shriveled seeds.

entities.name: RECOMBINANT INBRED LINE (RIL) POPULATION
entities.description: A population developed from contrasting parents used for phenotyping and genotyping.

entities.name: ICPL 99010
entities.description: A contrasting parent used to develop the RIL population.

entities.name: ICP 5529
entities.description: A contrasting parent used to develop the RIL population.

entities.name: FLOWER SHAPE
entities.description: A phenotypic characteristic used to select contrasting parents for the RIL population.

entities.name: AXIOM CAJANUS SNP ARRAY
entities.description: A high-density array used for genotyping the RIL population.

entities.name: SINGLE NUCLEOTIDE POLYMORPHISM (SNPS)
entities.description: Sequence variations used to generate a high-density genetic map.

entities.name: HIGH DENSITY GENETIC MAP
entities.description: A genetic map covering 6818 SNPs in 974 cM used for QTL analysis.

entities.name: QUANTITATIVE TRAIT LOCI (QTL) ANALYSIS
entities.description: A method used to identify genomic regions associated with specific traits.

entities.name: SEED SIZE
entities.description: A seed quality trait analyzed via QTL mapping.

entities.name: QCL3.2
entities.description: A consistent QTL identified for cleistogamous flower.

entities.name: CCLG03
entities.description: The linkage group in the pigeonpea genome where qCl3.2 is located.

entities.name: EPISTATIC QTLS
entities.description: QTLs involving interactions between different genomic regions for specific traits.

entities.name: MAP-BASED GENE CLONING
entities.description: A technique used to identify specific genes for target traits.
